records.ety: [From Rue, v.: cf. Icel. hryggð, hrygð.]

defs: Sorrow for the misery of another; pity; tenderness.
quotes: To stir up gentle ruth, Both for her noble blood, and for her tender youth.

defs: That which causes pity or compassion; misery; distress; a pitiful sight.
quotes: It had been hard this ruth for to see.
With wretched miseries and woeful ruth.
